data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"36a7-dbb5","generatedAt":"2026-04-17T04:54:51Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Plugin release channels: stable + dev marketplace entries with maintainer release script","description":"Two-channel pattern via marketplace.json with two git-subdir entries (dso \u2192 tag, dso-dev \u2192 main). Maintainer-facing scripts/release.sh at repo root with CI/clean-tree/validate.sh preconditions. Cutover migrates existing dso clients to stable channel silently.","successCriteria":["After the cutover commit, a downstream client running /plugin marketplace update sees their installed dso plugin re-resolved to the latest release tag (not to main HEAD).","Clients can run /plugin install dso-dev@<marketplace-name> to subscribe to per-merge updates from main. Validation signal: a /plugin marketplace update after a merge to main re-resolves dso-dev to the new commit.","A merge to main does not change the content that dso consumers see on their next marketplace refresh \u2014 only dso-dev consumers move forward.","scripts/release.sh cuts a release only after confirming (a) CI is green on the commit being tagged, (b) the working tree is clean and the local branch is main up-to-date with origin/main, and (c) plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes; the script aborts with a clear error message naming the failed precondition otherwise.","The first stable release tag (v1.13.0, the next minor bump from the current 1.12.32) is cut from main during epic execution, and the dso entry in marketplace.json is pinned to it via git-subdir.","INSTALL.md documents both channels (install commands for dso and dso-dev, recommendation to enable auto-update on the marketplace via the /plugin UI, and a one-line statement of the version semantics \u2014 dso advances on tagged releases, dso-dev advances on every merge to main)."]},"stories":[{"id":"8200-ef0f","title":"As a maintainer, I can publish a continuously-updated dev channel alongside the existing channel without affecting any current consumer","description":"Restructure marketplace.json: single relative-path entry \u2192 two git-subdir entries (dso, dso-dev), both pinning ref=main initially.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["marketplace.json exposes two plugin entries (dso and dso-dev) using source.source=git-subdir with url=navapbc/digital-service-orchestra, path=plugins/dso, ref=main.","Downstream client adding the marketplace and running /plugin install dso-dev@<marketplace-name> successfully installs from main.","Clients with dso already installed see no behavior change after marketplace refresh until the cutover commit lands.","Unit tests written and passing for marketplace.json structure validation."],"considerations":["[Reliability] marketplace.json edits must produce valid JSON \u2014 validate post-edit.","[Testing] Marketplace.json schema is fixed by Anthropic \u2014 assert against expected structure rather than against the current file content."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"Clients can run /plugin install dso-dev@<marketplace-name> to subscribe to per-merge updates from main"},{"id":"f455-d52a","title":"As a maintainer, I can run scripts/release.sh to cut a release with safety preconditions, but without yet altering client channel resolution","description":"Add scripts/release.sh at repo root + INSTALL.md documentation. Script gated on CI green + clean tree + on main up-to-date + validate.sh --ci. Includes JSON validation of marketplace.json post-edit, tag uniqueness check, interactive push confirmation.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["scripts/release.sh exists at repo root, executable, aborts with clear error on failed preconditions.","Script validates marketplace.json edit produces valid JSON before committing.","Script requires interactive confirmation (or --yes) before pushing to origin/main.","INSTALL.md documents install commands for both channels, auto-update recommendation, and version semantics.","Unit tests written and passing for release.sh precondition logic (mocked git/CI)."],"considerations":["[Reliability] Idempotency on partial failure; tag uniqueness check.","[Testing] Preconditions designed as pure/testable functions.","[Security] Push privileges to main \u2014 require interactive confirmation or --yes flag.","[Maintainability] Per CLAUDE.md rule 26, scripts/release.sh lives at repo root, NOT inside plugins/dso/."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["8200-ef0f"],"satisfiesCriterion":"scripts/release.sh cuts a release only after confirming preconditions"},{"id":"3bca-5f4e","title":"As a downstream client, I am pinned to a stable release tag rather than to main HEAD","description":"Cutover commit. Run scripts/release.sh to bump version to 1.13.0, create tag v1.13.0, edit marketplace.json to re-pin dso entry to v1.13.0, commit, push.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["git tag v1.13.0 exists on origin and plugin.json at that tag declares version: 1.13.0.","dso entry in marketplace.json on main has source.source=git-subdir and source.ref=v1.13.0.","Downstream client running /plugin marketplace update after cutover sees installed dso re-resolved to v1.13.0 (not main HEAD).","Subsequent merge to main does not change content dso consumers see \u2014 only dso-dev consumers move forward.","Integration test or manual verification recorded confirming cutover behavior on a sandbox client."],"considerations":["[Reliability] Atomic cutover \u2014 tag and marketplace.json edit must land in same push.","[Reliability] Auto-update OFF clients won't observe cutover until manual /plugin marketplace update \u2014 accepted per epic SC6.","[Security] This story performs the actual push to main."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["f455-d52a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"After the cutover commit, a downstream client running /plugin marketplace update sees their installed dso plugin re-resolved to the latest release tag"},{"id":"e56b-efc7","title":"Update project docs to reflect two-channel release model","description":"Update CLAUDE.md (architecture + quick reference), add ADR for the two-channel decision, add KNOWN-ISSUES.md entry for validate-issues OSError 75.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md mentions two-channel release model in Architecture section and lists scripts/release.sh in Quick Reference.","docs/adr/00X-plugin-release-channels.md exists with Status/Context/Decision/Consequences.","KNOWN-ISSUES.md has entry for validate-issues.sh OSError 75 in Claude Code web environment, cross-linking bug 3cd9-5a95."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md.","[Maintainability] ADR numbering increments from existing ADR-001 in design-notes.md."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["3bca-5f4e"],"satisfiesCriterion":"(project hygiene \u2014 no specific epic SC; documentation update story)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["8200-ef0f","f455-d52a","3bca-5f4e","e56b-efc7"]}}
